commands.name: deliberate
commands.description: Run RALPLAN deliberation for HIGH-complexity US before delegation. Loads .claude/skills/ralplan-deliberation.md.
commands.prompt: Load and follow the deliberation skill at .claude/skills/ralplan-deliberation.md for the current HIGH-complexity User Story.

commands.name: update-memories
commands.description: Audit and refresh stale Serena memories. Run after phase gates or significant refactors.
commands.prompt: Load and follow the skill at .claude/skills/update-memories.md
